name: cnerp
description: CNERP — ERP vận hành thương mại Trung–Việt

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev -w @cnerp/api" "npm run dev -w @cnerp/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @cnerp/shared && npm run build -w @cnerp/api && npm run build -w @cnerp/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @cnerp/api && npm run lint -w @cnerp/web
